programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Kyle plans the perfect Aspen day; Diana and Garcelle pick sides, Dorit finds herself caught in the middle; Crystal and Sutton go hat shopping.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.sub-title: We Need to Talk About Kathy
programme.desc: Kathy skips the flight home from Aspen; Erika tells Dorit she's hurt; Crystal's Roaring '20s birthday party.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Erika throws a pop-up product launch; Dorit and Crystal question old friendships; Erika and Sutton build a new connection; Kathy faces Kyle to apologize.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Garcelle celebrates her success with a big party and makes an even bigger purchase with some encouragement from Sutton and Crystal; Lisa's refusal to accept Kathy's apology leaves Kyle holding the bag for her sister.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Disco lights can't hide the drama as Dorit freezes out peace and absences sting.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Dorit unveils her new book cover, but not everyone is ready to celebrate; Boz delights the group with her engagement announcement; the women reunite at Kathy's jewelry party where Dorit squares off against Kyle, Erika and Sutton.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: Follows a wave of British blue bloods, American expats and international socialites who light up London's social scene.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live With Andy Cohen
programme.desc: Host Andy Cohen welcomes guests from some of television's most popular series, as well as other entertainment stars, to chat about pop culture and celebrities in the news.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Dorit unveils her new book cover, but not everyone is ready to celebrate; Boz delights the group with her engagement announcement; the women reunite at Kathy's jewelry party where Dorit squares off against Kyle, Erika and Sutton.

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: As Ben Waddell's new girlfriend arrives to the Summer House, she and Ciara Miller bond over manicures: "This is for every bitch who said I don't make friends easily.".

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: With her grand opening approaching, Kelli finds herself under fire as accusations surface from multiple directions; Drew makes her return to the silver screen and slips up about what's really been happening.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Following the lives of powerhouse boss Leva Bonaparte and her staff at Republic Garden & Lounge, the hottest nightclub in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.desc: Kellyoke encore: "I Will (When You Do)"; Bob Odenkirk; Anna Cathcart; rad human: Green Bronx Machine; Kelly Extra: Steve Carell, Danielle Deadwyler, Phil Dunster and Charly Clive; WIL: origami shelters.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: This Guy Better Be Hot; Truth: Am I Number 14 or Not?
programme.desc: Jariah's ex-boyfriend, Stedman, had a baby with Jariah's best friend, Tykena -- and Tykena believes there's more he's not telling; after an extensive genealogy search, Carla uncovers a potential sister named Chrystal, and the women believe they share the same father, who is not the man Carla always believed was her dad.

programme.title: BravoCon Live With Andy Cohen
programme.desc: Gathering Bravo's most legendary shade assassins in "The Reading Room" for a night of sharp-tongued comedy and clapbacks that only Bravo's most clever wordsmiths can provide!

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Bradley, Joe, and TJ learn about new VIP Server Oisin's side hustle; Mia apologizes for her outburst but not to Leva; Maddi snaps when a new detail about Trevor's cheating allegation surfaces.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Joe's bromance with Oisin continues to bloom, much to the chagrin of his close friends. Maddi's feeling toward Trevor get thrown for a loop when Mikel reveals shocking information from Trevor's night out. The group comes together for Grace Lilly's birthday bash, but when Oisin drops a major bombshell about an alleged hookup from boys night, things quickly take a turn for the worse. Will and Emmy question the loyalty of their closest friends.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Following Grace Lilly's birthday party, Will is left having to defend himself from the cheating rumors. Protective friend Mia takes things into her own hands and digs for the truth. Bradley attempts to escape the friends zone by asking Lucía out on a date. After Maddi drops the ball at Republic, Emmy grows tired of Maddi's leadership style and wonders if she can do the job better.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: When Maddi scores a huge DJ gig for James Kennedy, she jumps at the opportunity and leaves her position at Republic open for Emmy to step in and prove herself as acting VIP Manager; as Mia's dating life heats up, Grace and Liam's love turns cold.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Joe questions where to take his relationship with Salley after TJ's revelations. Grace reconsiders her future with Liam and plans the perfect escape to save her cat. As Maddi scrambles to save her job from Emmy, new cheating evidence against her boyfriend Trevor spreads through Charleston.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Still reeling from her co-workers meddling in her relationship, Maddi brushes off attempts to reconcile with Emmy; Mikel comes clean to Bradley about a rumor from the past; things between Bradley and Lucía get hot and heavy.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: The group continues to live it up in Miami with DJ gigs, water sports and yacht parties, but things take a turn when a secret group chat is exposed; friends become foes when a fun reflection turns into everyone airing their grievances about Maddi.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Maddi shares a surprise voice recording with Joe; Emmy receives some unexpected news; Leva brings the circus to town for one night.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Emmy succeeds in her new role; Joe starts to spiral; Will departs for law school; Maddi as she comes face-to-face with someone from Trevor's past.

programme.title: Strays
programme.desc: Abandoned on the mean city streets by his lowlife owner, Doug, a naive but lovable dog named Reggie falls in with a fast-talking, foul-mouthed Boston Terrier and his gang of strays. Determined to seek revenge, Reggie and his new canine pals embark on an epic adventure to get him home and make Doug pay for his dirty deed.

programme.title: Champions
programme.desc: A former minor-league basketball coach receives a court order to manage a team of players with intellectual disabilities. Despite his doubts, he soon realizes that together they can go further than they ever imagined.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: Imbecilic best friends Lloyd Christmas (Jim Carrey) and Harry Dunne (Jeff Daniels) stumble across a suitcase full of money left behind in Harry's car by Mary Swanson (Lauren Holly), who was on her way to the airport. The pair decide to go to Aspen, Colo., to return the money, unaware that it is connected to a kidnapping. As Harry and Lloyd -- who has fallen in love with Mary -- are pursued across the country by hired killers and police, they find both their friendship and their brains tested.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: Imbecilic best friends Lloyd Christmas (Jim Carrey) and Harry Dunne (Jeff Daniels) stumble across a suitcase full of money left behind in Harry's car by Mary Swanson (Lauren Holly), who was on her way to the airport. The pair decide to go to Aspen, Colo., to return the money, unaware that it is connected to a kidnapping. As Harry and Lloyd -- who has fallen in love with Mary -- are pursued across the country by hired killers and police, they find both their friendship and their brains tested.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Yes Man
programme.desc: Carl Allen is stuck in a rut with his negative ways. He goes to a self-help seminar and learns to unleash the power of yes. Living in the affirmative leads him to all sorts of transforming experiences; he gets a job promotion and even finds a new romance. But Carl finds that too much of anything, even positive thinking, is not necessarily a good thing.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: "Summer House" cast members react and give commentary on the latest episode as they watch it for the first time.

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: "Summer House" cast members react and give commentary on the latest episode as they watch it for the first time.

programme.title: BravoCon Live With Andy Cohen
programme.desc: Andy Cohen hosts the #1 Guys & Gals In The Group on "Bravo," featuring an all-out battle of the sexes (and a few exes?) with the casts of "Summer House," "Southern Charm," "Southern Hospitality" and "The Valley.".

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Brad attempts to bury the hatchet with Maddi and makes a revelation about Emmy; the group heads to Folly Beach for a healing trip where Mia confronts Maddi upon arrival.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Emmy is in the hot seat at the group dinner; Joe tries to prove his worth at work; Grace Lilly makes waves at Girls and Gays night.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: After Grace crosses a line, Maddi is pushed to the brink; Lake struggles to balance her friendships after receiving some unexpected news from Michols; Brad questions Emmy's sincerity after Justin spills some tea; Grace reveals a secrets.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Amidst brewing tensions, Maddi and TJ plan a group trip to the Edisto River; Nichols gives Lake the silent treatment; Emmy attempts a reset with Brad.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: The group continues their river vacation; Nichols remains hung up on Lake; Emmy tries to clear the air with Brad; once everyone's back in Charleston, tensions arise between Maddi and Joe.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Following the lives of powerhouse boss Leva Bonaparte and her staff at Republic Garden & Lounge, the hottest nightclub in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Strays
programme.desc: Abandoned on the mean city streets by his lowlife owner, Doug, a naive but lovable dog named Reggie falls in with a fast-talking, foul-mouthed Boston Terrier and his gang of strays. Determined to seek revenge, Reggie and his new canine pals embark on an epic adventure to get him home and make Doug pay for his dirty deed.

programme.title: Champions
programme.desc: A former minor-league basketball coach receives a court order to manage a team of players with intellectual disabilities. Despite his doubts, he soon realizes that together they can go further than they ever imagined.
